queries: ("Polycystic Ovary Syndrome"[Mesh] OR "polycystic ovary syndrome"[tiab] OR "polycystic ovarian syndrome"[tiab] OR PCOS[tiab] OR "Stein-Leventhal"[tiab]) AND ("Pregnancy Outcome"[Mesh] OR "Infant, Newborn"[Mesh] OR offspring[tiab] OR newborn*[tiab] OR neonat*[tiab] OR infant*[tiab] OR perinatal[tiab])

("Polycystic Ovary Syndrome"[Mesh] OR PCOS[tiab] OR "polycystic ovary"[tiab] OR "polycystic ovarian"[tiab] OR "Stein-Leventhal"[tiab]) AND ("Premature Birth"[Mesh] OR preterm[tiab] OR "preterm birth"[tiab] OR "preterm delivery"[tiab] OR "premature birth"[tiab] OR "Gestational Age"[Mesh] OR "gestational age"[tiab] OR "Fetal Growth Retardation"[Mesh] OR "fetal growth restriction"[tiab] OR "intrauterine growth restriction"[tiab] OR IUGR[tiab] OR "Infant, Small for Gestational Age"[Mesh] OR "small for gestational age"[tiab] OR SGA[tiab] OR "Birth Weight"[Mesh] OR "birth weight"[tiab] OR birthweight[tiab] OR "low birth weight"[tiab] OR LBW[tiab] OR "Intensive Care Units, Neonatal"[Mesh] OR "neonatal intensive care"[tiab] OR NICU[tiab] OR "Perinatal Mortality"[Mesh] OR "perinatal mortality"[tiab] OR "perinatal death"[tiab] OR "Fetal Death"[Mesh] OR stillbirth*[tiab])

(("Polycystic Ovary Syndrome"[Mesh] OR PCOS[tiab] OR "polycystic ovary syndrome"[tiab]) AND (offspring[tiab] OR newborn*[tiab] OR neonat*[tiab] OR infant*[tiab])) AND (compar*[tiab] OR control*[tiab] OR "without PCOS"[tiab] OR "non-PCOS"[tiab] OR "reference group"[tiab] OR matched[tiab])

(("Polycystic Ovary Syndrome"[Mesh] OR "polycystic ovary syndrome"[tiab] OR "polycystic ovarian syndrome"[tiab] OR PCOS[tiab]) AND ("Pregnancy Outcome"[Mesh] OR "birth outcome*"[tiab] OR "neonatal outcome*"[tiab] OR "perinatal outcome*"[tiab] OR "birth weight"[tiab] OR birthweight[tiab] OR preterm[tiab] OR SGA[tiab] OR NICU[tiab])) AND (cohort[tiab] OR "case-control"[tiab] OR "case control"[tiab] OR prospective[tiab] OR retrospective[tiab] OR longitudinal[tiab] OR registry[tiab] OR "population-based"[tiab] OR "cross-sectional"[tiab])

("Polycystic Ovary Syndrome"[Mesh]) AND ("Infant, Newborn"[Mesh] OR "Infant, Small for Gestational Age"[Mesh] OR "Fetal Growth Retardation"[Mesh] OR "Premature Birth"[Mesh] OR "Birth Weight"[Mesh] OR "Infant Mortality"[Mesh] OR "Perinatal Mortality"[Mesh] OR "Intensive Care Units, Neonatal"[Mesh] OR "Pregnancy Outcome"[Mesh])

inclusion_criteria: Observational human studies (cohort, case–control, cross-sectional, or registry-based) that compare offspring of women with PCOS to offspring of women without PCOS

Population includes liveborn or stillborn offspring from singleton pregnancies; maternal PCOS defined by recognized clinical criteria (e.g., Rotterdam/NIH/AE-PCOS) or medical record/registry diagnosis

Reports at least one birth/perinatal outcome: preterm birth, fetal growth restriction/small for gestational age, low birth weight/mean birthweight, neonatal intensive care unit admission, or perinatal mortality
Provides extractable comparative data (e.g., counts, rates, means, or effect estimates) for PCOS vs non-PCOS groups
exclusion_criteria: Non-comparative designs (case reports, case series), reviews, editorials, conference abstracts, animal or in vitro studies
Studies without a non-PCOS comparison group or where PCOS exposure is not clearly defined/separable
Do not report any of the prespecified birth/perinatal outcomes or cannot separate outcomes for PCOS vs non-PCOS
Studies including only multiple gestations or not reporting singleton data separately
screening_criteria.description: Screening criteria to identify observational studies comparing birth and perinatal outcomes in offspring of women with PCOS versus women without PCOS.

included_articles.title: The impact of androgens on pregnancy and fetal outcomes in patients with polycystic ovary syndrome.
Analysis of Pregnancy Outcomes in Women with Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS): A Retrospective Study.
Impact of Elevated AMH Levels on Maternal and Perinatal Outcomes in IVF Pregnancies with PCOS.
Growth Restriction in the Offspring of Mothers With Polycystic Ovary Syndrome.
Anthropometric Measurements in Newborns: A Comparative Study of Infants Born to Mothers With and Without Polycystic Ovary Syndrome.
The impact of obesity surgery on newborn anthropometrics in women with and without polycystic ovary syndrome.
The impact of pre-pregnancy overweight/obesity on the birth weight of offspring born from women with polycystic ovarian syndrome.
Birth weight in offspring of mothers with polycystic ovarian syndrome.
Assessment of glucose tolerance and pregnancy outcome of polycystic ovary patients.
Pregnancy complications and birth outcomes in women with polycystic ovary syndrome undergoing frozen embryo transfer.
Polycystic ovary syndrome and gestational diabetes mellitus association to pregnancy outcomes: A national register-based cohort study.
Gestational Weight Gain in Women With Polycystic Ovary Syndrome: A Controlled Study.
